arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Director pickpocketed in Barcelona ahead of clash with Hansi Flick’s side
arts.sum: Anyone visiting Barcelona is advised to be aware of their belongings while out in public, whether they be a tourist or a director at a major football club. Reports in Catalunya say that a member of the Bayern Munich expedition to Barcelona was robbed on Tuesday evening. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star names Barcelona pair as his ‘idols’ ahead of UCL clash
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has revealed that he considers a pair of Barcelona legends as his footballing ‘idols’, ahead of the upcoming meeting between the clubs. Barca and Bayern…

arts.ttl: Sane ‘SURPRISE’: Bayern Munich star’s reaction to Newcastle links
arts.sum: Leroy Sane has reacted to transfer rumours linking him with a January move to Newcastle United, though the reaction of the Bayern Munich winger will not be one to please the Toon Army. Sane ‘SURPRISE’: Bayern Munich star’s reaction to Newcastle rumours

arts.ttl: Report: Musiala to start on bench against Barcelona
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Jamal Musiala will start on the bench for Bayern Munich against FC Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich no longer the desired club for Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah flirted with the Bavarians over the summer, but the move never came to be, and now his options have grown: Jonathan Tah is still determined to leave Bayer Leverkusen on a free transfer next summer.

arts.ttl: Wing Stop: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany keeps communication open with competitive winger group
arts.sum: With Michael Olise, Serge Gnabry, Kingsley Coman, and Leroy Sané all available at the wing position to face FC Barcelona, Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has plenty of options to choose from. When asked if he has a “pecking order” at the position, Kompany declined to answer, but did say that he keeps an open line of communication with all of this players.

arts.ttl: Madrid and Barcelona apply for 2027 Champions League final
arts.sum: The decision-making process for the 2027 Champions League finals is underway, and Spain’s two biggest cities are angling to host both of them. This year San Mames will hold the Europa League final in Bilbao.
